PaletteDragHint: Drag a node to the flow →
PalTrigIntervalHint: Triggers at regular intervals or via cron
PalTrigTicketInColumnHint: Triggers when a ticket is in a given column
PalTrigGitCommitHint: Triggers when a new commit is detected
PalTrigStatusChangeHint: Triggers when a ticket changes column
PalTrigSubTicketsHint: Triggers when sub-ticket statuses CSV changes
PalTrigBoardIdleHint: Triggers when all tickets are in 'idle' columns
PalTrigAgentInactivityHint: Triggers after N minutes without dispatch
PalCondTicketInColumnHint: Only runs if the ticket is in a column
PalCondTicketAgeHint: Filters by ticket creation or update age
PalCondHasParentHint: Only runs if the ticket is a sub-ticket or a root
PalCondAllSubTicketsInStatusHint: Only runs if every sub-ticket of the firing ticket is in the selected statuses
PalActRunSkillHint: Runs claude with a skill file
PalActSetLabelsHint: Adds or removes labels from the ticket
PalActAddCommentHint: Adds a comment to the ticket without invoking Claude
PalActCommitAgentMemoryHint: Persists the agent memory.md file atomically after a run
PalActExecutePowerShellHint: Runs a PowerShell script on the server
